title: Where the Bullets Fly
original_title: Tutti fratelli nel west... per parte di padre
overview: Young adventurer Gipo owns one fifth of a rock illustrating the location of a rich gold mine. Risking his life more than once and with the help of the beautiful hooker, Lulu Belle, our hero sets out to recover the missing pieces.
